CandidateCreateRequest.description:
Input payload for candidate profile creation.

Attributes:
    owner_subject_id: Optional explicit owner subject id (used by HR).
    first_name: Candidate first name.
    last_name: Candidate last name.
    email: Candidate e-mail.
    phone: Optional phone number.
    location: Optional location/city.
    current_title: Optional current title.
    extra_data: Extensible profile fields.

get.description: List accountant-visible onboarding rows for the current actor.
Download accountant-visible workspace rows as CSV or XLSX attachment.
List employee registration keys with pagination and optional filters.

post.description: Issue one-time employee registration key for self-registration.
Revoke active employee registration key.

get.description: List staff accounts with pagination and optional filters.

post.description: Create staff account directly via admin privileges.

patch.description: Patch staff account role and/or active-state through admin privileges.

get.description: List audit events with deterministic filters and pagination.
Download audit events as CSV or JSONL attachment.

post.description: Issue access and refresh JWT token pair for staff account.
Invalidate current token and session via Redis denylist.

get.description: Return identity metadata derived from current access token.

post.description: Rotate JWT token pair using refresh token.
Register staff account using one-time employee key and issue token pair.

get.description: List candidate profiles with recruiter-facing search, filter, and pagination.

post.description:
Create candidate profile resource.

Args:
    request: HTTP request context.
    payload: Candidate create request.
    _: RBAC validated role marker.
    auth_context: Authenticated actor context.
    service: Candidate domain service.

Returns:
    CandidateResponse: Created profile payload.

get.description: Get one candidate profile by identifier.

patch.description: Patch one candidate profile by identifier.

get.description: Download active candidate CV as attachment stream.

post.description: Upload candidate CV file via backend multipart endpoint.

get.description: Return structured CV analysis with evidence for latest active CV.
Return latest asynchronous CV parsing status.

post.description: Create one employee profile from a persisted hire conversion.

get.description: Read onboarding portal payload for the authenticated employee.

patch.description: Update one employee-actionable onboarding task for the authenticated employee.

get.description: Read one employee profile by identifier.
List notifications that belong to the current authenticated recipient.
Return the on-demand notification digest for the current authenticated recipient.

post.description: Mark one recipient-owned notification as read.

get.description: List onboarding progress rows visible to the current HR or manager actor.
Read one onboarding dashboard detail payload with employee summary and tasks.
List onboarding tasks for one onboarding run.

post.description: Backfill onboarding tasks for one legacy onboarding run that has none yet.

patch.description: Update staff-managed workflow fields for one onboarding task.

get.description: List onboarding checklist templates.

post.description: Create one onboarding checklist template.

get.description: Read one onboarding checklist template by identifier.

put.description: Replace one onboarding checklist template by identifier.

get.description: Return ordered pipeline transition history for one vacancy+candidate pair.

post.description: Append one candidate pipeline transition event.

get.description: Return public parsing status for one anonymous candidate application.
get.summary: Get Public Candidate Cv Parsing Status

get.description: Return public CV analysis for one anonymous candidate application.
Load current public interview registration payload for one token.

post.description: Decline interview via public token.
Confirm attendance for current token-bound schedule.
Request interview reschedule via public token.

get.description: Read KPI snapshot rows for a single month.
Download KPI snapshot rows for a single month as CSV or XLSX attachment.

post.description: Rebuild KPI snapshot rows for a single month.

get.description: List vacancy resources.

post.description: Create vacancy resource.

get.description: Return manager-scoped hiring summary plus visible vacancies.
Load one vacancy resource by identifier.

post.description: Submit public candidate application with CV to target vacancy.

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix epoch timestamp for limit reset

get.description: List interviews for one vacancy with optional candidate/status filters.

post.description: Create one active interview and enqueue calendar sync.

get.description: Read one interview by vacancy-scoped identifier.

post.description: Cancel one interview and remove public access immediately.

get.description: Read current-version interview feedback summary for HR or assigned interviewer.

put.description: Create or replace the current interviewer's feedback for active schedule version.

post.description: Replace schedule window and enqueue new sync.
Reissue a fresh public token for the current synchronized schedule.

get.description: Return the read-only candidate snapshot for one manager-visible vacancy.
List latest score/status entries for one vacancy.

post.description: Enqueue scoring or return existing latest score job for one candidate.

get.description: Load latest score/status payload for one candidate in one vacancy.
Read current offer lifecycle state for one vacancy+candidate pair.

put.description: Create or update draft offer fields for one vacancy+candidate pair.

post.description: Record accepted status for one sent offer.
Record declined status for one sent offer.
Move one draft offer to `sent`.

get.description:
Return a lightweight service health response.

Returns:
    dict[str, str]: Static health status payload used by monitoring checks.

Expose sorted RBAC matrix for operational inspection.

Returns:
    dict[str, list[str]]: Roles mapped to granted permissions.
